_comment: Verified commercial payers wired via their public FHIR Plan-Net Provider Directory (CMS-9115-F). Copy to payers.json and add the payers whose networks you want as VERIFIED filters. Each entry maps to a plan id the UI groups under `category`. Optional `payer` defaults to `id`; add `api_key_header`/`api_key` if the payer requires a free developer key. Payers you do NOT wire here still appear as clearly-labeled ESTIMATED filters from the curated catalog (app/catalog.py).

payers._note: Maryland Medicaid MCO (Johns Hopkins). Public Plan-Net, no auth. Live-validated 2026-06-15: /PractitionerRole returned a Bundle of 83,024.
payers.label: Priority Partners (JHHP)

payers._note: Premera Blue Cross (WA/AK only — NOT national BCBS), hosted by Opala. Public Plan-Net, no auth. Live-validated 2026-06-15: /PractitionerRole returned a Bundle of 94,993. Add a matching regional entry to app/catalog.py before enabling so it surfaces as a named filter without overclaiming national BCBS.
payers.label: Premera Blue Cross (WA/AK)
